payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and a small round knob at the lower-right; surface appears worn and slightly faded with decorative top molding visible, image is low-light and mildly blurred, and the left edge of the cabinet is slightly cut off in the crop — approximate distance ~1.0 m.
